plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-182 RP05.P04.M02.S08-RP05.P04.M04.S17 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-182 adds descriptor-only Matter Core UI interaction workflow fixtures for secondary interaction, permission/audit display, safe error copy, responsive layout, keyboard focus, density, synthetic fixture binding, and build smoke.

handoff.open_scope: Continue RP05.P04.M04.S18 onward Hermes UI evidence and synthetic fixture set without runtime persistence, live DOM rendering, or Loop execution.
